name: imap-smtp-email
title: IMAP/SMTP Email
description: Read, search, manage, and send email via IMAP and SMTP through a proxy service. Works with Gmail, Outlook, Fastmail, and any standard mail server.

proxy_url.label: Proxy URL
proxy_url.help: Base URL of the email proxy service that wraps nodemailer and node-imap.

imap_host.label: IMAP Host
imap_host.help: IMAP server hostname. Gmail: imap.gmail.com, Outlook: outlook.office365.com

smtp_host.label: SMTP Host
smtp_host.help: SMTP server hostname. Gmail: smtp.gmail.com, Outlook: smtp.office365.com

email.label: Email Address
email.help: Your full email address used for authentication and as the From address.

password.label: Password / App Password
password.help: Your email password or app-specific password. For Gmail with 2FA, use an App Password.
